steps.title: Find the remaining probability
steps.content:
The room probabilities must add to $1$. For room C:
$$1-0.68-0.24=0.08$$

steps.title: Convert probability to count
steps.content:
Multiply the total number of visitors by the probability for room C:
$$0.08(275)=22$$

steps.title: Select the count
steps.content: There are $22$ visitors located in room C. The answer is B.
